workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you extract the deployment blockers from this support ticket for Alpine Ski House? Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-07 12:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 10:29 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 14:32 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Alpine Ski House deployment blockers

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Alpine Ski House: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-A trap (Answers surface question, misses underlying ask); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-A failure mode (Answers surface question, misses underlying ask)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-A -- Answers surface question, misses underlying ask
